sites.narrative_summary: Long-standing PCP in Jacksonville. Managed hypertension, type 2 diabetes, and hyperlipidemia. Performed annual wellness exams, preventive screenings, immunizations, and depression screening. First to identify cognitive concerns and refer to neurology. Provided transfer-of-care summary when Harold relocated to Georgia.

Diagnosed Alzheimer's disease. Ordered brain MRI and neuropsychological testing to rule out reversible causes. Managed donepezil therapy and performed serial MMSE and MoCA assessments for cognitive monitoring. Wrote referral letter for Georgia neurology transition.

locations.name: DeKalb Primary Care
locations.address_summary: 2701 North Decatur Road, Suite 300, Decatur, GA 30033

sites.narrative_summary: New PCP after relocation to Georgia. Continued management of hypertension, type 2 diabetes, and hyperlipidemia. Added amlodipine for blood pressure control. Identified vitamin D deficiency. Performed positive PHQ-2 depression screen and referred to social work. Updated immunizations and coordinates with Emory neurology.

locations.name: Emory Cognitive Neurology Center
locations.address_summary: 12 Executive Park Drive NE, Suite 200, Atlanta, GA 30329

sites.narrative_summary: Comprehensive Alzheimer's disease management after relocation. Performed full neurocognitive battery documenting progression from mild to moderate stage. Switched medication to donepezil/memantine combination (Namzaric). Discussed advance care planning and goals of care with authorized representative. Placed occupational therapy referral for home safety.

Single emergency department encounter for mechanical fall at home. CT head and right hip X-ray were negative. Forehead laceration repaired with dermabond. Discharged with fall precautions and PCP follow-up instructions.
